calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Tatiana Pavlova-Coleman, Esq., for Rosalina Zanas, Petitioner.

Doug Bohne, Esq., for Felix Ortega & American Research Bureau (ARB), Objector/Assignee.

At the court's query regarding meet and confer efforts, Mr. Bohne reports that he believes that Mr. Ortega no longer wishes for him to represent him and that communication has broken down. Mr. Bohne advises that he is not opposed to the court granting the instant petition and if the court is not inclined to do so, he intends to file a Motion to Withdraw as Mr. Ortega's counsel. Ms. Pavlova-Coleman offers insight as to the status of the matter. The court and Mr. Bohne discuss the issue if him representing both Mr. Ortega and ARB. At the conclusion of the discussion, the court re-confirms with Mr. Bohne that he does not oppose the court granting the instant petition.

The subject matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Jun-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tatiana Pavlova-Coleman appeared by zoom for Rosalina Zanas.
Reid Harada appeared by zoom for Felix Ortega.

Mr. Harada stated that he is not here to object, and that they reached an agreement in terms of them not objecting. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The undated holographic will is admitted to probate. Rosalina Zanas is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration remains set for March 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Michael Kasolas remains the appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
